name: Parabola

auth.notes: No public Parabola product API authentication found. Auth is configured per connector/API step when Parabola calls external services; supported patterns include bearer tokens, basic auth, custom headers, and OAuth2/client-credentials-style expiring tokens.

rateLimits: No public Parabola product API rate limits found. Flow schedules and trigger queues are plan and feature dependent; official docs state webhook/email-triggered flow runs can queue up to 1000 pending runs.
pagination: No public Parabola product API pagination found. Parabola's API steps can call external APIs and support endpoint-specific pagination patterns, including GraphQL offset/limit variables.
notes: Official docs explicitly say Parabola does not currently have a developer portal for building custom integrations.
Agents should treat Parabola primarily as a no-code data automation tool with API-calling and webhook-trigger capabilities, not as a public product API target.
